notes: Video-MME ('General Video QA'); from the embedded multimodalData chart array.

Reported on the official model card as 'Video-MME v2'; mapped to the base videomme slug — flagging that this may be a newer/harder variant of the benchmark rather than the original Video-MME, so treat as approximate.

Reported as 'VideoMME(w/o sub.)' in Table 6 (Vision→Text), Video Understanding section — vision-only, no subtitles. A second, higher-scoring VideoMME variant ('VideoMME with audio' = 79.3, use_audio_in_video=True) appears in Table 7 (AudioVisual→Text) but was deliberately excluded here to avoid two conflicting scores under the same 'videomme' slug; see coverageNotes.
Table 6 (Vision→Text), Video Understanding section, Qwen3.5-Omni-Plus column, cell S5.T6.3.28.4. Paper labels row 'VideoMME (w/o sub.)' — without-subtitles setting.
